reasoning: Elon Musk's net worth recently rebounded strongly. Despite Larry Ellison briefly overtaking him earlier in October 2025 due to a Tesla slump, Musk bounced back. As of October 24, 2025, just two days prior to the forecast date, reports indicate his net worth is $462 billion on the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, giving him a massive >$100 billion lead over his closest competitor (Ellison). Given the market gave an 86% probability on October 16 even when the race was much closer or arguably tighter, a $100 billion lead with just 2 months left makes it highly likely (93%) he will remain #1. The remaining 7% accounts for extreme volatility in Tesla stock, which has swung by >$80 billion in a matter of months previously, opening a slight window for a competitor if Oracle or Meta surge precisely as Tesla slumps.
